title: MODIFIKATSIYALANGAN POLIAKRILONITRILNING DIMETILFOROAMIDDA ERITILISHI
author: Xasanov, Sirojiddin
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This article provides general information about the polymer reagent “FAR-PANC MCP” and studies some of its properties. Information is provided about some of its solvents, among which the optimal ones are selected.
steps_raw: This article provides general information about the polymer reagent “FAR-PANC MCP” and studies some of its properties. Information is provided about some of its solvents, among which the optimal ones are selected.
keywords: "FAR-PANC MCP", polyacrylonitrile (PAN), cellulose derivative, solvents, Dimethylsulfoxide, Dimethylformamide.
